bird.name: Mountain parakeet
bird.summary: The mountain parakeet (Psilopsiagon aurifrons), also known as the golden-fronted parakeet, is a species of parrot, one of two in the genus…

relations.subject: Mountain parakeet
relations.evidence: It is found in the Puna grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Mountain parakeet
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Mountain parakeet
relations.evidence: Its typical habitat is among vegetation near rivers, on bushy slopes, among scrub, on rough grassland with cacti and brush and agricultural land
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
